Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiangsu Dingji Bolite Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Dingji Bolite Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a typical case of a 'Zhujiang Road weak-current and server room engineering integrator' misjudged as a heavy electronic manufacturing plant. The forensic engine has completely eradicated the underlying preset massive Apple Inc. consumer electronics OEM system. The official system was confused by the extremely grandiose words in its name 'Jiangsu Dingji' (Jiangsu Top-tier), 'Electronic Technology,' and the 'R&D' words pieced together in the front part of its license, mechanically categorizing it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and OSINT module directly punctured this disguise: this is a micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of 5 million and a 2024 insured headcount of 10 people. The most core demotion strike comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 4213, Building 2, No. 88 Zhujiang Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' In an office on the upper floors (Room 13 on the 42nd floor) of a commercial building on Zhujiang Road (a famous computer city street in Nanjing), employing 10 workers to establish an electronic manufacturing assembly line? This is impossible in terms of physics and fire safety regulations. Reviewing the extremely honest latter half of its business license: 'air-conditioning equipment installation, network engineering, lightning protection engineering, server room information system integration, electronic automation control system engineering construction.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic plant, but a pure 'Weak Current & Datacenter Engineering Contractor operating inside an office building.' These 10 people are primarily project managers, network engineers, and after-sales personnel, mainly undertaking engineering projects such as building server room construction, lightning protection grounding, and weak-current network cabling.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
